name: lost-kingdom-foundation
description: Image-independent data foundation for Lost Kingdom: Age of Reconstruction.

scripts.test: node --test tests/catalog-data.test.cjs tests/prompt-manifest.test.cjs tests/growth-upgrade.test.cjs tests/monetization-data.test.cjs tests/asset-application.test.cjs tests/audio-assets.test.cjs tests/privacy-policy.test.cjs tests/building-era-image-prompts.test.cjs tests/web-preview-data.test.cjs tests/web-game-runtime.test.cjs tests/release-readiness.test.cjs
scripts.check: npm test && npm run build:data && npm run validate:data && npm run build:prompts && npm run validate:prompts && npm run validate:assets && npm run validate:sounds && npm run build:preview && npm run build:game && npm run validate:release
